reservation.title: RESERVATION
reservation.subtitle: Booking Process

steps.step2_desc: After booking on Naver, you will receive a 'Toss Order' notification via KakaoTalk. Please pay the 90,000 KRW deposit to confirm your reservation.

reservation.final_notice: ✅ Once confirmed, we will send you detailed guidelines for your photoshoot prep. 💖✨

location.title: LOCATION
location.subtitle: How to find us
location.address:
B1, Artium Bldg, 18 Gangnam-daero 160-gil, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
(Parcel: B1, 508-4 Sinsa-dong, Gangnam-gu, Seoul)
location.parking:
Please use a paid parking lot.
Nearby: Doowon Bldg, 636 Gangnam-daero, Gangnam-gu (3,000 KRW/hour)

list.question: How do I make a reservation?
list.answer: Book via Naver Reservation. It is confirmed once the deposit (90,000 KRW) is paid within 4 hours after consultation.

list.question: How can I change or cancel my booking?
list.answer: You can change once up to 50 days before the shoot. 100% deposit refund only for cancellations 50 days prior. Penalty applies from 49 days or on the day.

list.question: When should I arrive?
list.answer: Please arrive 30 minutes before your scheduled time for changing clothes and pumping up. Arriving too early may result in a lack of waiting space.

list.question: Can I bring friends or a pet?
list.answer: Up to 2 companions (trainers/friends) are allowed. You can also shoot with your pet at no extra cost.

list.question: Is there a hair & makeup partnership?
list.answer:
You can get a discounted price at our partner 'Mabelle GGuttique'.
• Women: 88,000 KRW (VAT included)
• Men: 66,000 KRW (VAT included)

[Reservation Info]
• Direct booking required (No business trip)
• Tel: 0507-1359-1859
• Address: 1F, 5 Hakdong-ro 47-gil, Gangnam-gu, Seoul (5 mins walk from Gangnam-gu Office)
• KakaoTalk Channel: https://pf.kakao.com/_QPjsxb?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQPMTI0MDI0NTc0Mjg3NDE0AAGnaE51q1t4FDA0DOnxsJHIiqwqlznx0KIhhXs0oL6ylMyqysBIC8HMy7cxt98_aem_0kdbP2JNBJTvwrsJ-3de9A
• Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mabelle_korea_?igsh=MTV4eTJybGFoYzlodQ==

list.question: When will I receive the retouched photos?
list.answer: Original web-size files (approx. 150 cuts) will be emailed on the day. The 1st retouched draft takes about a month after your photo selection.

list.question: Is parking available?
list.answer: No parking in the building. Please use the paid parking lot at 'Doowon Building' nearby.

services.header_desc: OPEN YEAR ROUND · Reservation Only · All prices include VAT / Card & Cash receipt available

notices: Retouching period: 1 cut same-day retouching, the rest within 4 weeks for the 1st draft (additional edits possible).
Original files are provided in web size (around 2000px).
Additional retouching costs 33,000 KRW per cut.
For parking, please use the Doowon Building paid parking lot.
Provide 1 free retouched cut for Naver review, 1 free retouched cut for SNS upload consent.
